  • Module
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AK47
    AK47 represents a specific weapon type, inheriting common behavior from the Weapon class.
    AWP
    AWP represents a specific weapon type, inheriting common behavior from the Weapon class.
    Bat
    Bat represents a specific melee weapon type, inheriting common behavior from the Weapon class.
    BlackBrick
    The BlackBrick class represents a block with a black brick texture.
    BlankWeapon
    Used as a filler
    Block
    The Block class serves as a base for various block types in the game.
    BlockDrawer
    BlockDrawer extends the Drawer class to handle graphical representations of blocks.
    BlockManager
    BlockManager is responsible for discovering, registering, and providing instances of Block classes.
    Brick
    The Brick class is an implementation of the Block class that represents a standard brick.
    Bullet
    The Bullet class represents a projectile in the game, extending the base Projectile class.
    BulletType
    BulletType enumerates the various types of ammunition available in the game.
    Camera
    The Camera class is used to follow an entity and keep the screen centered around it.
    Chest
    The Chest class represents an interactable container that can store items.
    Chunk
    The Chunk class is used to store info about chunk.
    ChunkManager
    ChunkManager is responsible for managing chunks in the game.
    ChunkManager.ChunkCharacteristics
    ChunkCharacteristics holds details about each chunk.
    ChunkManager.ChunkTags
    Chunks tags
    Collision
    The Collision class represents a collision boundary used to detect interactions between entities, blocks, or other unmovable objects.
    Collision.CollisionType
     
    CustomCursor
    The CustomCursor class provides functionality for tracking the mouse cursor's position within a JavaFX scene.
    DeathScreen
    DeathScreen sets up the user interface displayed when the player loses the game.
    DeleteRequest
    DeleteRequest is used to send a request to the server to delete an entity.
    Drawer
    Drawer is responsible for representing and updating the graphical aspects of game objects.
    Enemy
    The Enemy class defines the common behavior and properties of all enemy entities.
    EnemyType
    The EnemyType enum defines the types of enemies available in the game.
    Entity
    The Entity class represents a basic game object with position, dimensions, health, and collision handling.
    Entity.Direction
    The possible directions for an entity.
    Entity.State
    Represents the state of an entity.
    EntityBehaviour
    EntityBehaviour is used to determine the behaviour of the entity
    EntityManager
    The EntityManager class is responsible for discovering and registering entity classes and creating entity instances for game use.
    EntityStates
    What the entity is doing right now
    FireMode
    FireMode enumerates the different firing modes available for weapons in the game.
    Game
    The Game class is the main entry point for the application.
    HealthKit
    The HealthKit class represents a healing item in the game.
    HudManager
    HudManager is responsible for managing and displaying the game's heads-up display (HUD).
    Interactable
    The Interactable interface should be implemented by any class whose objects can interact with the player or other entities within the game.
    Item
    Used to further categorize classes, Items are objects that can be stored in chests or handled by player or any other entity
    Level
    Level encapsulates the game level, including its layout, chunks, and spawn positions.
    LevelGenerator
    LevelGenerator is responsible for procedurally generating game levels.
    LevelGenerator.AbstractLevel
    Contains info on what doors the individual chunks have, without any information on chunks
    LevelGenerator.ChunkToPlace
    ChunkToPlace encapsulates the position and door configuration for a chunk placement.
    LevelGraph
     
    LevelManager
    LevelManager is responsible for discovering and loading level files.
    LevelNode
    LevelNode represents a single node in the level graph.
    M16
    M16 represents a specific weapon type, inheriting common behavior from the Weapon class.
    MainMenu
    MainMenu represents the graphical main menu of the game.
    MeleeHitBox
    The MeleeHitBox class represents the area of effect for melee attacks in the game.
    MeleeWeapon
    The MeleeWeapon class represents a melee-type weapon used within the game.
    MouseClick
    MouseClick represents the state of the mouse click event.
    NetworkManager
    The NetworkManager class is responsible for setting up and maintaining the connection between the server (host) and client in a multiplayer game.
    PauseRequest
    this class is used to send a request to the server to pause the game
    Pistol
    Pistol represents a specific weapon type, inheriting common behavior from the Weapon class.
    Player
    The Player class represents a controllable player entity in the game.
    Projectile
    The Projectile class represents any projectile in the game that affects entities and environment through collisions.
    Setup
    Setup class provides helper methods to configure UI and block rendering for the game.
    ShareSound
    This class is used to send a request to the server to play a sound
    ShootingSlime
    The ShootingSlime class represents an enemy that uses ranged attacks.
    Shotgun
    Shotgun represents a specific weapon type, inheriting common behavior from the Weapon class.
    Slime
    The Slime class represents a melee enemy that follows a defined behavior.
    SMG
    SMG represents a specific weapon type, inheriting common behavior from the Weapon class.
    SoundManager
    The SoundManager class is responsible for playing and managing .wav sound effects.
    Team
    The Team enum defines the different teams in the game along with the classes that should be exempt from collision checks when interacting with other entities of the same team.
    TextureManager
    The TextureManager class is responsible for loading and storing texture images.
    TransmittedPlayer
    The TransmittedPlayer class represents a special version of the player used for multiplayer synchronization.
    UnPauseRequest
    this class is used to send a request to the server to unpause the game
    Update
    The Update class provides static methods to update positions and visibility for both blocks and entities based on the camera position.
    UserInputHandler
    UserInputHandler handles all user inputs including keyboard, mouse, and scroll events.
    Utils
    The Utils class provides various utility functions including classpath scanning, logging configuration, settings file creation/loading, and generating a list of blocks.
    Utils.Coordinates
     
    VoidBlock
    The VoidBlock class represents a block that acts as a void or empty space but is still considered a wall.
    VoidLevelNode
     
    Weapon
    The Weapon class is an abstract representation of a weapon in the game.
    WeaponEntity
    The WeaponEntity class represents a special entity used for in-game weapons that are containing weapon instances.
    WeaponManager
    The WeaponManager class is responsible for managing and instantiating weapon types in the game.
